etimesViral video claims Pakistan on ‘Indian spy alert’ after Dhurandhar 2 - here’s the truthFollowing the success of Ranveer Singh's film 'Dhurandhar 2', a viral video of Pakistani police conducting street checks was falsely linked to the movie. This incident highlights how easily the internet can misinterpret events, creating a fictional narrative around real-life occurrences.
